## Ciena's Inclusion in Major Growth Indices Prompts Reexamination of Its Investment Narrative

Index inclusion can re-price a name independent of near-term fundamentals by broadening the passive buyer base and shifting categorization; PM should track whether growth-index status is drawing new institutional flows that alter CIEN's technical setup.

- SimplyWall.st examines whether Ciena's (CIEN) addition to major growth indices is reshaping how the stock is categorized and valued.
- Index inclusion is a structural demand event; the framing suggests a potential narrative re-rating beyond the mechanical passive-flow bid.
- Medium classifier confidence; no fundamental business catalyst disclosed in the headline.
- Specific indices referenced in the inclusion are not named in the headline.
